Interface ContactRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Contact,ContactKey>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Contact,ContactKey>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Contact,ContactKey>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Contact,ContactKey>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Contact,ContactKey>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Contact>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Contact,ContactKey>
@Repository public interface ContactRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Contact,ContactKey>

  • Method Details

    • findAllContactOfUser

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :user_id OR c.contactUser.id = :user_id") List<Contact> findAllContactOfUser(@Param("user_id") UUID user_id)

    • findByUserIdAndContactUserId

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :userId AND c.contactUser.id = :contactUserId") Contact findByUserIdAndContactUserId(@Param("userId") UUID userId, @Param("contactUserId") UUID contactUserId)

    • findAllFollowerOfUser

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.contactUser.id = :contactUserId AND c.status = :status") List<Contact> findAllFollowerOfUser(@Param("contactUserId") UUID contactUserId, @Param("status") int status)

    • findAllFollowingOfUser

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :userId AND c.status = 2") List<Contact> findAllFollowingOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • findAllBlockedOfUser

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :userId AND c.status = 3") List<Contact> findAllBlockedOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • findByContactUserIdAndStatus

      @Query("FROM Contact c WHERE c.contactUser.id = :contactUserId AND c.status = :status") List<Contact> findByContactUserIdAndStatus(@Param("contactUserId") UUID contactUserId, @Param("status") int status)

    • countFollowerOfUser

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(c) FROM Contact c WHERE c.contactUser.id = :userId AND c.status = 2") long countFollowerOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • countFollowingOfUser

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(c) FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :userId AND c.status = 2") long countFollowingOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • countPendingOfUser

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(c) FROM Contact c WHERE c.contactUser.id = :userId AND c.status = 1") long countPendingOfUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • hasBlockedRelationship

      @Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(c) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM Contact c WHERE (c.user.id = :userId1 AND c.contactUser.id = :userId2 AND c.status = 3) OR (c.user.id = :userId2 AND c.contactUser.id = :userId1 AND c.status = 3)") boolean hasBlockedRelationship(@Param("userId1") UUID userId1, @Param("userId2") UUID userId2)

    • hasBlockUser

      @Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(c) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :user AND c.contactUser.id = :blockedUser AND c.status = 3") boolean hasBlockUser(@Param("user") UUID user, @Param("blockedUser") UUID blockedUser)

    • hasFollowUser

      @Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(c) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM Contact c WHERE c.user.id = :user AND c.contactUser.id = :contactUser AND c.status = 2") boolean hasFollowUser(@Param("user") UUID user, @Param("contactUser") UUID contactUser)

    • findAllBlockRelations

      @Query(" SELECT new ti.dabble.dtos.BlockContactDto(\n CASE\n WHEN c.user.id = :userId THEN c.contactUser.id\n ELSE c.user.id\n END,\n CASE\n WHEN c.user.id = :userId THEN ti.dabble.enums.BlockStatus.BLOCKED\n ELSE ti.dabble.enums.BlockStatus.IS_BLOCKED\n END\n )\n FROM Contact c\n WHERE c.status = 3\n AND (c.user.id = :userId OR c.contactUser.id = :userId)\n") List<BlockContactDto> findAllBlockRelations(@Param("userId") UUID userId)
